title: Amazon Creators API — OAuth (PA-API 5.0, item-lookup scope only)
description: Implement Amazon Product Advertising API 5.0 (PA-API) integration in lib/deepcheck/auth.ts. OAuth flow: redirect user to Amazon auth endpoint from Options > Deep Check tab (P2.1), receive and securely store access token (encrypted via P1.2 storage layer). Scopes: item-lookup only — no write permissions, no order access, no personal data. Token refresh logic. Per-call rate limiting: max 10 requests/min enforced client-side. All API calls HTTPS only. TDD for OAuth token storage, refresh, and rate-limit enforcement.
